SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Auto-start Gateway
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Automatically start gateway on app launch

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Background Persistence
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Ensure gateway stays running in background

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Auto-start Ollama
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Automatically start Ollama service on app launch

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Auto-download Models
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Download missing models automatically when running

EditTextPreference.app:title: Custom Run Command
EditTextPreference.app:summary: Command used for 'Run Model' (Default: ollama run [model])

EditTextPreference.app:title: OpenClaw Install Command
EditTextPreference.app:defaultValue: pkg install -y nodejs && npm install -g openclaw@latest
